examples:
<sqf>
collect3DENHistory 
{
	_logic = create3DENEntity ["Logic", "Logic", position player];
	add3DENConnection ["Sync", [_logic], player];
}; // Creates a logic and connects it to player in one history step.
</sqf>

<sqf>
[nil, nil, "a3\3den\data\cfg3den\history\moveitems_ca.paa"] collect3DENHistory 
{
	create3DENEntity ["Object","B_Soldier_F", screenToWorld [0.5,0.5]];
}; // Change only the icon
</sqf>
name: collect3DENHistory

Item.desc: code that is executed in [[Scheduler#Unscheduled_Environment|Unscheduled Environment]]
Item.name: code

Item.desc: text of the entry that is added to the history list
Item.name: text

Item.desc: - path to the icon that is displayed left of the ''text''. Must not start with a {{hl|\}}!
Item.name: icon

Item.desc: code that is executed in [[Scheduler#Unscheduled_Environment|Unscheduled Environment]]
Item.name: code
